subject: feat(ux): update tutorial modal with station detail and menu steps
body:
Added 2 new tutorial steps covering features that were missing:
- Station details: price trends, 30-day history chart, share, directions
- Menu & settings: dark/light mode toggle, admin access, saved preferences

Also updated USER_GUIDE.md with price trends, history chart, and share.
